chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1227 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 27.03.2025 Mr. Ishfaque Ahmed Abro, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Arshad Adnan Jatoi, Special prosecutor NAB Mr. Safdar Kamal Ansari, Advocate for Respondents No.3&4/NADRA >>>>>..<<<<< On 06.03.2025, the following order was passed;- “None present for the petitioner nor intimation received same was position on the last date of hearing viz. 13-12-2023. The petition is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution. However, in the interest of justice the petition is adjourned to 27.03.2025. Let intimation notice be issued to the learned counsel for the petitioner.” Today none present for the petitioner nor any intimation is received. The absence on the part of the petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests that they are no more interested to pursue the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
